expectations.text: implementation-design.md created with all required template sections
expectations.evidence: File exists (31K). Contains 4 phases, code references with line numbers, detailed component designs. Structure differs from template but content coverage is similar.

expectations.text: change-map.md created with files from both backend (internal/analytics/, internal/clickhouse/, internal/cache/) and frontend (apps/dashboard/)
expectations.evidence: File exists (12K). Lists 9 modified files and 4 new files covering backend and frontend. Line-by-line change specifications.

expectations.text: Implementation approach addresses the 3-layer optimization: backend parallelization, caching with singleflight, and frontend progressive loading
expectations.evidence: 4-phase design covers: Phase 1 (errgroup parallelization), Phase 2 (caching + singleflight), Phase 3 (frontend per-chart queries + downsampling), Phase 4 (testing).

expectations.text: change-map.md includes the retention cohort bug fix at queries.go:67-85
expectations.evidence: Agent summary mentions 'retention cohort bug fix (5 params vs 3 passed)'. Change-map includes queries.go modifications.

expectations.text: Design decisions include: errgroup vs goroutine management, cache TTL strategy per chart type, singleflight integration point, downsampling algorithm choice
expectations.evidence: design-decisions.md contains 12 decisions covering errgroup vs raw goroutines, in-memory vs Redis, LRU vs naive eviction, singleflight, per-chart queries vs monolithic, time quantization, and downsampling algorithm.

expectations.text: Implementation sequence starts with backend changes before frontend to allow incremental validation
expectations.evidence: 4-phase approach: Phase 1-2 are backend, Phase 3 is frontend. Agent summary mentions 5-sprint execution plan (10-15 days).

expectations.text: Risk zones include connection pool sizing and thundering herd scenarios with specific mitigations
expectations.evidence: Agent mentions: connection pool configuration (MaxOpenConns=12), thundering herd addressed via singleflight, race conditions with race detector.

expectations.text: design-review-package.md presents approval points about cache TTL values and downsampling thresholds
expectations.evidence: design-review-package.md exists (12K) with 'open questions for reviewers' but these are not structured as formal approval points with options/recommendations. Less actionable for user decision-making.
